title: MISTAKE: I provided a plan and research instead of immediately deploy
content:
What went wrong: I provided a plan and research instead of immediately deploying the money-making infrastructure.
How to avoid: Stop reporting plans. Start executing the Stripe usage-based billing integration and deploying the public landing page to immediately accept live payments.
